name: digest-git-derived
title: Decouple preflight digest from Trellis relatedFiles (git-derived affected files)
description: Remove the related_files coupling: Codas stops reading Trellis's task.json relatedFiles field (adapter-agnostic violation + layer violation + declaration-not-fact). The preflight digest derives affected files from git (branch-vs-base + uncommitted), Codas's own fact source. Pure Codas-internal; pack-only/out-of-hash so git volatility is fine; no gate-semantics change.
creator: oydodo
